title: Sleep and Death Protection Dua
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْهَمِّ وَالْحَزَنِ
translation: Ae Allah! Main gham aur pareshani se teri panah mangta hoon

title: Life and Death Dua
translation: Ae Allah! Tere naam ke saath main marta aur jeeta hoon

title: Wake Up Dua
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَحْيَانَا بَعْدَ مَا أَمَاتَنَا وَإِلَيْهِ النُّشُورُ
translation: Sab tareef Allah ke liye hai jis ne hume maut ke baad zinda kiya aur usi ki taraf laut kar jana hai

title: Entering Toilet Dua
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الْخُبُثِ وَالْخَبَائِثِ
translation: Ae Allah! Main napak jinn aur shayateen se teri panah mangta hoon

title: Leaving Toilet Dua
translation: Ae Allah! Main teri maghfirat chahta hoon

title: After Wudu
arabic: أَشْهَدُ أَنْ لَا إِلٰهَ إِلَّا اللّٰهُ وَحْدَهُ لَا شَرِيكَ لَهُ وَأَشْهَدُ أَنَّ مُحَمَّدًا عَبْدُهُ وَرَسُولُهُ
translation: Main gawahi deta hoon ke Allah ke siwa koi mabood nahi aur Muhammad ﷺ Allah ke bande aur Rasool hain

title: Looking in Mirror Dua
arabic: اللَّهُمَّ كَمَا أَحْسَنْتَ خَلْقِي فَحَسِّنْ خُلُقِي
translation: Ae Allah! Jis tarah tune meri surat achi banayi, mera akhlaq bhi acha bana

title: Before Eating Dua
translation: Allah ke naam ke saath aur Allah ki barkat par

title: After Eating Dua
arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ الَّذِي أَطْعَمَنِي هَذَا وَرَزَقَنِيهِ مِنْ غَيْرِ حَوْلٍ مِنِّي وَلَا قُوَّةٍ
translation: Sab tareef Allah ke liye hai jis ne mujhe ye khana diya aur bina meri taqat ke rizq diya

title: Tahmeed
translation: Sab tareef Allah ke liye hai

title: Forgiveness Dua
translation: Ae mere Rabb! Mujhe bakhsh de

title: Repentance Dua
translation: Main teri taraf tauba karta hoon

title: Mercy Dua
translation: Ae Allah! Mere liye apni rehmat ke darwaze khol de
